title: convolvulus grantii
intro: Convolvulus grantii, also known as the bush morning glory, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus grantii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Convolvulus grantii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with its leaves and stems typically used in herbal preparations.
